name: Force Dark
description: Intelligently force any page into dark mode. Uses CSS color-scheme, smart background inversion, and text color correction — not a simple overlay. Attempts to preserve images, videos, and embedded content while darkening the page chrome.

configItems.name: Background brightness (%)
configItems.description: How dark the background should be. 0 = pure black, 100 = no change.

configItems.name: Preserve images and videos
configItems.description: Do not invert images, videos, and embedded content.

configItems.name: Text brightness (%)
configItems.description: Brightness of corrected text. 100 = white, 70 = soft gray.
